# CWE-472 positive: hidden role form field trusted for refund (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-472-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func RefundOrder(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	_ = r.ParseForm()
	orderID := r.FormValue("order_id")
	role := r.FormValue("role")
	if role != "manager" {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	_, _ = db.Exec("UPDATE orders SET status = 'refunded' WHERE id = ?", orderID)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
